title: Registration Form - Dark Mode Step 1
prompt:
Title: Registration Form - Dark Mode Step 1
Context: Registration details form for GOOGLE AI ECOSYSTEM BOOTCAMP 2026.
Description of the screen: A tech-focused 'Dark Mode' registration form for the AI Bootcamp. 
- PROGRESS BAR: A minimalist glow-effect stepper at the top highlighting 'Bước 1: Thông tin'.
- CARD: A dark charcoal glassmorphism card with the headline 'Hoàn tất thông tin đăng ký Bootcamp'.
- INPUTS: High-contrast, dark-themed input fields for Full Name, Phone, Job Title (Dropdown), and Goals (Text area). Labels are crisp white.
- CTA: A vibrant 'Tiếp tục thanh toán' button that glows with a Google-colored border.
- SIDEBAR/DECOR: A small sidebar or background element showing 'Lợi ích khóa học' (briefly) to reinforce the value proposition. 
- FEEL: High-end, secure, and futuristic. Variant 2 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
